phrases.en: Dan pulls the shower curtain shut.
By turning the knob, he turns the water on.
He washes his hair with shampoo.
And the rest of his body with soap.
phrases.zh: 再用肥皂洗身体的其余部位。

phrases.en: Then, he rinses off with water.
phrases.zh: 然后，他用水把身体冲干净。

phrases.en: After turning the water off, he steps out of the shower.
phrases.zh: 关掉水后，他走出淋浴间。

phrases.en: He takes a towel from the towel rack.
phrases.zh: 他从毛巾架上拿一条毛巾。

phrases.en: He wraps a towel around himself.
He puts some deodorant under his arms.
phrases.zh: 他在腋下涂一些除臭剂。
